bento.title: Merit Scholarship
bento.description: Up to 75% tuition support for outstanding academic performers in entrance exams and prior studies.

bento.title: Need-Based Aid
bento.description: Financial assistance for students demonstrating genuine economic need with supporting documentation.

bento.title: Women in Tech
bento.description: Encouraging more women to pursue IT and education technology careers.

bento.title: Sports & Talent
bento.description: Recognition for exceptional achievement in sports, arts, or community leadership.

bento.title: Rural Access Fund
bento.description: Dedicated support for students from remote and underserved communities in Eastern Nepal.

applySteps.title: Receive admission offer
applySteps.description: Scholarship consideration begins after you are offered a place in BIT or B.Tech Ed IT.

applySteps.title: Submit scholarship form
applySteps.description: Complete the financial aid application with required supporting documents.

applySteps.title: Review committee
applySteps.description: Applications are evaluated based on merit, need, and scholarship category criteria.

applySteps.title: Award notification
applySteps.description: Successful applicants receive scholarship details before the enrollment deadline.

commitment.title: Transparent criteria
commitment.description: Clear eligibility guidelines published for every scholarship category.

commitment.title: Student-first review
commitment.description: Applications evaluated fairly with respect for each student's circumstances.

commitment.title: Renewal support
commitment.description: Ongoing guidance to help scholars maintain eligibility and academic progress.

commitment.title: Growing fund
commitment.description: Annual expansion of scholarship pools through foundation and partner contributions.

faq.question: Can I apply for multiple scholarships?
faq.answer: Students may be considered for more than one category, but total aid is capped per institutional policy. The committee assigns the most suitable award.

faq.question: Do scholarships cover full tuition?
faq.answer: Merit scholarships can cover up to 75% of tuition. Partial awards and need-based grants are also available depending on funds.

faq.question: Is the scholarship renewable?
faq.answer: Most awards require maintaining a minimum GPA each semester and good academic standing to continue receiving support.

faq.question: When should I apply?
faq.answer: Submit your scholarship application alongside or immediately after accepting your admission offer, before the enrollment deadline.
